label: New
items: Your lists now show what matters: plants that are growing (or have history) plus the ones you've hearted — everything else stays tucked away in search. Adding something new hearts it automatically so it never disappears on you.
Ailments work the same way with the watchlist: binoculars everywhere (no more hearts), one Watchlist chip, and adding an ailment watches it automatically.

Plant tiles now show a "past" count for instances that reached end of life — and tapping a history entry reopens its full record: amend the outcome, read the AI's thoughts on why it might have died early, and add details to help it learn.

label: Improved
items: The Plants and Ailments tabs finally match: same card layout, same actions menu, same grid.
Planted counts no longer include plants that reached end of life.
On desktop you can now scroll the plant window's tabs with your mouse wheel — no more unreachable tabs.
